prompt: style: Cinematic Realism v1, mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting, color palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. cinematic live-action video shot. scene: Apartment Kitchen Night. red fridge, wooden table, rainy window. lighting: dim warm lamp + blue moonlight. character (charA_v1): short_black, white_hoodie + black_jeans, silver_ring_left_hand. Lin Che falls to his knees on the floor., Memories flood into him like cold water, overwhelming him., He realizes he once locked his mother in the basement to keep her from leaving. Narration: "林澈跪在地上，记忆像冷水灌进胸口。他曾经为了留住母亲，犯下不可逆的错。". Protagonist A says: "我不是故意的。". Camera motion: tight close-up, shallow depth of field, subtle breathing camera drift. Close-up of a man kneeling on a kitchen floor, anguish on his face, cold blue lighting, tears, dramatic shadows, emotional climax. Character identity locked to reference images. No face morphing or outfit variation.. Scene layout locked to context reference frame. Do not reposition props or alter lighting source.. Camera transition smooth from previous shot continuity frame. No abrupt jump cut between shots. Stable visual consistency across entire clip. No character drift, no prop mutation, no scene layout shift.
negative: cartoon, neon cyberpunk (unless explicitly requested), sunlight, daylight, modern led lights, crowd, blurry, overexposed, extra characters, bright colors, multiple characters, duplicate person, clone, inconsistent lighting, wrong angle, lens distortion, chromatic aberration, mouth mismatch, silent face, frozen expression, unnatural dubbing, face morphing, character drift, outfit change, prop mutation, scene layout shift, extra fingers, distorted limbs, text artifacts, burnt-in subtitles, logo, watermark, motion blur excessive, flickering, framing jump cut
motion: tight close-up, shallow depth of field, subtle breathing camera drift
tool_hint: Copy "prompt" and "negative" into video generation tool. Upload "condition_images" for img2vid start/end frame conditioning if supported. "context_ref_images" are previous shot keyframes for visual continuity. Duration is a guideline.
